creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

I can confirm that all of these pass on amd64:

Python 3.8 (default):
[x] poudriere testport
[x] poudriere bulk
[x] make test
[x] make test with an actual device plugged in (runs one more test)

Python 3.9:
[x] poudriere testport
[x] poudriere bulk
[x] make test
